insights.title: AI Products segment is the primary growth engine
insights.detail: AI Products revenue grew 122.6% YoY, from $8.4M to $18.7M. This is the fastest-growing segment and is projected to exceed $100M annual revenue by Q3 2026.

insights.title: Professional Services decline requires attention
insights.detail: Professional Services revenue declined 32.9% YoY, from $15.8M to $10.6M. This is the only segment showing negative growth and may indicate a strategic shift away from services toward product revenue.

insights.title: Management projects 18-24% growth for FY2026
insights.detail: Full-year 2026 revenue guidance is $620M–$650M. The wide range (6% spread) suggests uncertainty, likely tied to AI Products adoption pace.

recommendation.summary: Strong Q4 results driven by Cloud and AI Products growth. The Professional Services decline is a concern but appears to be a deliberate strategic pivot. Forward guidance of 18-24% growth is achievable given current momentum.
